breaking_news_suggestions.headline: Dome's Only Completed Test Ignored for 14 Days — We're Calling It
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: PRED-105 (cucumber growth under copper coil EMF) had a 14-day test window that closed April 18. The dome's own auto-pipeline has been running daily with zero adjudication across 24+ consecutive polls. At the 14-day mark we classify this as tacit withdrawal — the dome had its PASS/FAIL/REFINED taxonomy available and chose not to use it.
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: First prediction in our catalog to reach tacit_withdrawal classification. Demonstrates the systematic non-adjudication pattern alongside PRED-106.
